name: Frog Hollow Pickleball
description: Frog Hollow Pickleball is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Walla Walla, WA. There are 3 indoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like lights. The courts are free. You can reserve the courts.

name: Kiwanis Park
description: Come play pickleball at Kiwanis Park in College Place, WA! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and water.

description: Come play pickleball at Menlo Park in Walla Walla, WA! There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms.
